query:
SELECT
             (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes), 0) FROM workspace_storage_usage WHERE workspace_id = $1)::bigint as "committed!",
             -- reservation of every OTHER in-flight upload
             (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(t.total - t.existing, 0)), 0)
                FROM (SELECT SUM(part_bytes) as total, MAX(target_existing_size) as existing
                        FROM workspace_multipart_inflight
                        WHERE workspace_id = $1 AND upload_id <> $2
                          AND created_at > now() - ($4::text)::interval
                        GROUP BY upload_id) t)::bigint as "other_reserved!",
             -- this upload's already-recorded parts, excluding the part being (re)uploaded
             (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(part_bytes), 0)
                FROM workspace_multipart_inflight
                WHERE workspace_id = $1 AND upload_id = $2 AND part_id <> $3)::bigint as "this_other_parts!"
